narrative:
Perry 20 (precinct in Stark County) has 682 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Republican lean of 3.2 percentage points.
